name: compose-recording-master-playback-smoke
command:
bash -lc $'
set -euo pipefail
OUT=/home/dima/dev/vexa-agents-pack-pipeline-strategy/.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-1-recording-playback-trust/compose/recording-master-playback-smoke
mkdir -p "$OUT"
API_PORT=$(grep -E "^API_GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=" .env | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2)
API_PORT=${API_PORT:-8056}
API_KEY=$(grep -E "^VEXA_API_KEY=" .env | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2-)
test -n "$API_KEY"

docker compose --env-file .env -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T meeting-api python - <<"PY" > "$OUT/seed.json"
import asyncio
import datetime as dt
import io
import json
import math
import struct
import time
import wave
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.orm import attributes
from admin_models.models import APIToken, User
from meeting_api.database import async_session_local
from meeting_api.models import Meeting
from meeting_api.storage import get_storage_client


def wav_bytes(duration_seconds: float = 0.25, sample_rate: int = 16000) -> bytes:
    frames = int(duration_seconds * sample_rate)
    buf = io.BytesIO()
    with wave.open(buf, "wb") as wf:
        wf.setnchannels(1)
        wf.setsampwidth(2)
        wf.setframerate(sample_rate)
        for idx in range(frames):
            sample = int(32767 * 0.15 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * 440 * idx / sample_rate))
            wf.writeframes(struct.pack("<h", sample))
    return buf.getvalue()


async def main():
    async with async_session_local() as session:
        token = (await session.execute(select(APIToken).order_by(APIToken.id.desc()))).scalars().first()
        if token is not None:
            user_id = int(token.user_id)
        else:
            user = (await session.execute(select(User).order_by(User.id.asc()))).scalars().first()
            user_id = int(user.id if user is not None else 1)

        now = dt.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0)
        rec_id = 910000000 + int(time.time()) % 1000000
        media_id = rec_id + 1
        session_uid = "pack-1-compose-playback-proof"
        storage_path = f"recordings/{user_id}/{rec_id}/{session_uid}/audio/master.wav"
        audio = wav_bytes()
        get_storage_client().upload_file(storage_path, audio, content_type="audio/wav")

        meeting = Meeting(
            user_id=user_id,
            platform="google_meet",
            platform_specific_id=f"pack-1-compose-{rec_id}",
            status="completed",
            start_time=now - dt.timedelta(seconds=1),
            end_time=now,
            data={},
        )
        session.add(meeting)
        await session.flush()
        recording = {
            "id": rec_id,
            "meeting_id": meeting.id,
            "user_id": user_id,
            "session_uid": session_uid,
            "source": "bot",
            "status": "completed",
            "created_at": (now - dt.timedelta(seconds=1)).isoformat() + "Z",
            "completed_at": now.isoformat() + "Z",
            "playback_url": {"audio": f"/recordings/{rec_id}/master?type=audio", "video": None},
            "media_files": [
                {
                    "id": media_id,
                    "type": "audio",
                    "format": "wav",
                    "storage_backend": "minio",
                    "storage_path": storage_path,
                    "file_size_bytes": len(audio),
                    "duration_seconds": 0.25,
                    "metadata": {},
                    "created_at": now.isoformat() + "Z",
                    "is_final": True,
                    "finalized_by": "recording_finalizer.master",
                }
            ],
        }
        meeting.data = {
            "name": "PACK 1 Compose playback proof",
            "recording_enabled": True,
            "recordings": [recording],
        }
        attributes.flag_modified(meeting, "data")
        await session.commit()
        print(json.dumps({
            "meeting_id": meeting.id,
            "recording_id": rec_id,
            "media_file_id": media_id,
            "storage_path": storage_path,
            "bytes": len(audio),
            "user_id": user_id,
        }, sort_keys=True))

asyncio.run(main())
PY

REC_ID=$(python -c "import json;print(json.load(open(\"$OUT/seed.json\"))[\"recording_id\"])")
MEDIA_ID=$(python -c "import json;print(json.load(open(\"$OUT/seed.json\"))[\"media_file_id\"])")
MASTER_HTTP=$(curl -sS -w "%{http_code}" -o "$OUT/master.json" -H "X-API-Key: $API_KEY" "http://localhost:${API_PORT}/recordings/${REC_ID}/master?type=audio")
printf "%s\n" "$MASTER_HTTP" > "$OUT/master.http_status"
test "$MASTER_HTTP" = "200"
python - <<"PY" "$OUT/master.json"
import json, sys
data = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
url = data.get("url", "")
assert url.startswith("http://localhost:42268/"), url
assert data.get("download_url") == url
assert data.get("raw_url", "").endswith("/raw")
assert data.get("content_type") == "audio/wav"
assert data.get("duration_seconds") == 0.25
assert data.get("media_file_id") is not None
print(json.dumps({"master_url_host": "localhost:42268", "raw_url": data.get("raw_url"), "duration_seconds": data.get("duration_seconds")}, sort_keys=True))
PY
RAW_HTTP=$(curl -sS -w "%{http_code}" -o "$OUT/raw-range.bin" -D "$OUT/raw-range.headers" -H "X-API-Key: $API_KEY" -H "Range: bytes=0-15" "http://localhost:${API_PORT}/recordings/${REC_ID}/media/${MEDIA_ID}/raw")
printf "%s\n" "$RAW_HTTP" > "$OUT/raw-range.http_status"
test "$RAW_HTTP" = "206"
test "$(wc -c < "$OUT/raw-range.bin")" = "16"
grep -qi "content-range: bytes 0-15/" "$OUT/raw-range.headers"
printf "compose playback smoke passed for recording %s media %s on gateway port %s\n" "$REC_ID" "$MEDIA_ID" "$API_PORT"
'
hypothesis: Seeded completed recording in the Compose lane resolves through the gateway canonical master playback route and raw range fallback.
